source: Министерство на икономиката, годишен доклад за контрола на износа на продукти, свързани с отбраната (via SIPRI national reports). The cumulative-since-invasion figure is the sum of the 2022–2024 annual figures below (~13 bn BGN, matching government statements).
note: Bulgaria's export of defence-related products, EUR. SIPRI TIV drastically undercounts this because it excludes ammunition and shells — the bulk of the trade — so these Ministry-of-Economy euro figures are used, not TIV. Ukraine is largely supplied indirectly (via Poland, Romania, Czechia); the 'toUkraine' column is DIRECT exports only.
